methods.description: Process for collecting and preparing pollen grains from cultivated sunflower for further analysis.

steps.description: Pollen grains of cultivated sunflower were collected from fresh anthers, and 200 µ mesh was used to remove the non-pollen contaminants.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sunflower pollen and remove contaminants using 200 µ mesh

methods.description: Procedure for extracting proteins from pollen grains, including defatting, crushing, incubation, and sterilization steps.

steps.description: After defatting with diethyl ether, around 1.2 g of pollen was crushed in liquid nitrogen and incubated in 10 ml of 20 mM Bis-Tris (pH 6.5) buffer containing 3% glycerol at 4 °C for overnight with shaking.
steps.searchable_summary: defat pollen, crush in liquid nitrogen, incubate in Bis-Tris buffer overnight

steps.description: After centrifugation at 7500g, the supernatant was sterilized through 0.22 µ PVDF membrane.
steps.searchable_summary: centrifuge and sterilize supernatant using PVDF membrane

steps.description: The protein concentration was measured by Bradford assay using Bio-Rad Protein Assay Dye Reagent Concentrate following the manufacturer's protocol.
steps.searchable_summary: measure protein concentration using Bradford assay

methods.description: Chromatographic procedures to purify proteins from crude pollen extract using FPLC system and various columns.

steps.description: The crude pollen extract (5 mg/ml) was fractionated in HiTrap Q HP column equilibrated with the same buffer followed by elution of column-bound proteins using a linear gradient of 0.1-1 M NaCl.
steps.searchable_summary: fractionate crude pollen extract using HiTrap Q HP column and elute with NaCl gradient

steps.description: Eluted fractions containing the desired protein at a higher level of purity were pooled, dialyzed against 20 mM phosphate buffer (pH 7.4), and then concentrated in < 10 kDa cut-off Amicon Ultrafiltration device.
steps.searchable_summary: pool, dialyze, and concentrate protein fractions using ultrafiltration

steps.description: About 2 mg of concentrated protein was loaded onto a Superdex 75 10/300 GL gel filtration column.
steps.searchable_summary: load concentrated protein onto Superdex 75 column for gel filtration

steps.description: Eluted fractions were screened by IgE-western blot using serum of 4 sunflower-sensitized patients to check for the presence of Hel a 6.
steps.searchable_summary: screen protein fractions for Hel a 6 using IgE-western blot

steps.description: The fractions containing Hel a 6 at > 90% purity were pooled, dialyzed against 1 M ammonium bicarbonate buffer (pH 8.5), and lyophilized.
steps.searchable_summary: pool, dialyze, and lyophilize Hel a 6 fractions
